extraction.one_line_summary: CICCONE attacked early from break on La Planche des Belles Filles, held off TEUNS by 11 seconds to take stage and yellow jersey
tactical_patterns: CICCONE from Trek hesitated wanting others to work in break, should have soloed immediately for yellow jersey certainty
LANDA attacked 2km from summit on pavement before gravel transition but couldn't bridge to leaders or crack GC group
THOMAS accelerated in final kilometer taking time on ALAPHILIPPE and BERNAL, creating Ineos split with stronger GT form
Steep gravel final kilometer at 20% prevented pure climbers from using technical advantage, favoring power climbers who set tempo earlier

rider_signals.CICCONE Giulio: positive: Trek rider defied Giro fatigue expectations to take yellow, but showed tactical naivety hesitating in break
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: attacked final kilometer taking significant time on teammate BERNAL, established himself as Ineos GC leader
rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: negative: struggled to finish with THOMAS in final kilometer, lost time to teammate suggesting lesser form early Tour
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: neutral: attacked at 2km but couldn't bridge or distance GC group, isolated without team support
rider_signals.WELLENS Tim: positive: third consecutive day in breakaway securing KOM lead into Pyrenees through volume strategy
rider_signals.TEUNS Dylan: positive: nearly matched CICCONE on brutally steep finish, strong stage race climbing form
rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: negative: struggling throughout stage, French GC hopes fading early in home Tour
rider_signals.WOODS Michael: positive: climbed to ninth overall for EF, showing Grand Tour form materializing
rider_signals.ARU Fabio: negative: dropped from front group early on climb, Grand Tour climbing legs absent
